summary: Forecasts and Expense Analysis features testing complete. All backend endpoints working. Frontend ForecastsTab renders correctly with all components. ExpenseAnalysisBadges visible on admin dashboard. Fixed datetime comparison bug in recurrence expansion.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/forecasts - Lists all forecasts
✅ POST /api/forecasts - Creates forecast with all fields (date, label, amount, category, status, recurrence, recurrence_day, notes)
✅ POST /api/forecasts - Weekly recurrence works
✅ POST /api/forecasts - Monthly recurrence with recurrence_day works
✅ POST /api/forecasts - Invalid category defaults to 'autre'
✅ PUT /api/forecasts/{id} - Updates forecast
✅ PUT /api/forecasts/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent forecast
✅ DELETE /api/forecasts/{id} - Deletes forecast
✅ DELETE /api/forecasts/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent forecast
✅ GET /api/forecasts/dashboard - Returns treasury, available_now, per_day, totals, missing_amount, min_running_balance
✅ GET /api/forecasts/dashboard?horizon_days=7 - Returns 7-day horizon
✅ GET /api/forecasts/dashboard?horizon_days=60 - Returns 60-day horizon
✅ GET /api/forecasts/dashboard - per_day structure correct (date, items, decaissement, running_balance)
✅ GET /api/forecasts/dashboard - missing_amount = max(0, -min_running_balance)
✅ Weekly recurrence expanded correctly (4+ occurrences in 30 days)
✅ Monthly recurrence expanded correctly (appears on correct day each month)
✅ GET /api/expenses/analysis - Returns treasury and analyses array
✅ GET /api/expenses/analysis - Each analysis has duplicates, stock_matches, treasury_impact
✅ GET /api/expenses/analysis - Treasury impact levels (low/moderate/warning/critical) calculated correctly
✅ Frontend: Prévisions tab (data-testid='tab-forecasts') visible for admin only
✅ Frontend: ForecastsTab (data-testid='forecasts-tab') renders correctly
✅ Frontend: forecasts-kpis (4 cards) visible
✅ Frontend: forecasts-alert visible when missing_amount > 0
✅ Frontend: forecasts-chart (line chart) visible
✅ Frontend: forecasts-agenda visible with forecast items
✅ Frontend: forecasts-list visible with all forecasts
✅ Frontend: forecasts-add-btn opens forecast-modal
✅ Frontend: forecasts-horizon selector changes horizon and reloads dashboard
✅ Frontend: Creating forecast via modal works and refreshes list
✅ Frontend: ExpenseAnalysisBadges (data-testid='expense-analysis-badges') visible on admin dashboard
✅ Frontend: Prévisions tab NOT visible for manager role (correct)
✅ Frontend Regression: Analytics, Hebdo, Produits, Clients, Utilisateurs, Statistiques tabs all work
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed datetime comparison bug in _expand_recurrence() - base_date from date-only strings was offset-naive while start_date/end_date were offset-aware (UTC)
forecasts.py router correctly integrated at line 90 in server.py
Treasury calculation uses CA semaine validé - dépenses approuvées/terminées
Duplicate detection uses score-based system (description similarity + same supplier + common products + same day)
Stock matches check product name inclusion and warn if qty > stock_min * 1.5
seed_data_creation: Existing forecasts: 'Loyer mensuel' 150000 F (monthly day 1), 'Salaire Mères' 120000 F (monthly day 30)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forecasts and Expense Analysis features fully tested. Fixed datetime bug in recurrence expansion. All 20 backend tests pass. Frontend components render correctly. Prévisions tab is admin-only.

bug_fix_applied.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added timezone.utc to base_date when it's offset-naive (from date-only strings like '2026-04-18')
